n_effective.note: N varies by metric coverage. Minimum N=16 for P/DE x FRE growth (MET-VD-014; sentinel nullification reduced N for this multiple). Maximum N=23 for Total AUM and Fundraising ratio (near-universal coverage). Modal N=22 applies to most operational metrics.

temporal_depth.primary_period_note: FY2024 is the most recently reported full fiscal year for calendar-year firms as of March 2026. HLNE (FIRM-015) uses FY2025 (March fiscal year ending March 2025) as the FY2024 proxy.
temporal_depth.temporal_stability_note: Single cross-section; temporal stability cannot be formally tested without a full prior-period cross-section at the same N.

ci_method.method_note: Percentile bootstrap (not BCa) due to small N. BCa requires reliable jackknife acceleration estimates, which are unstable for N<25. Percentile method is conservative — CIs are wider but more honest at small N.

minimum_sample_rule.rationale: N<12 produces unreliable Spearman estimates. Critical value for p<0.05 significance is rho=0.587 at N=12 and rho=0.506 at N=15. At N<8, the 95% CI covers the full range [-1, +1] and the estimate is uninformative.
minimum_sample_rule.applied_note: All 51 computed pairs have N>=16. No pairs were dropped for insufficient N.

multiple_testing_correction.recommendation: BH-FDR at q=0.10 is the primary correction standard. Only 2 of 51 tests survive. Exploratory patterns (p<0.05 but failing BH) are documented but treated as hypothesis-generating only.

sensitivity_analysis_summary.loo_result: AUM x P/FRE: removing BX reduces rho from +0.73 to ~+0.62. FEAUM x P/FRE: removing BX reduces rho from +0.60 to ~+0.52. FRE growth x EV/FEAUM (exploratory): removing HLNE shifts rho from -0.61 to ~-0.54. No classification changes.
sensitivity_analysis_summary.temporal_stability_note: Single FY2024 cross-section; temporal stability testing not possible. Prior-period panel insufficient for full test.
sensitivity_analysis_summary.outlier_exclusion_result: Excluding PGHN from DE/share correlations shifts rho x P/FRE from +0.17 to approximately +0.30-0.35; still unsupported classification. No classification changes for any driver.

driver_classification_summary.stable_driver_note: No stable_value_driver (|rho|>=0.50 on >=2 multiples) identified in this run. The broader 23-firm sample including European and EM-based managers introduces structural heterogeneity that reduces cross-sectional signal strength. This contrasts with the base run (2026-03-10-run2) where G&A/FEAUM was classified as stable; run4 G&A/FEAUM max|rho|=-0.45 on P/FRE only.

universe_changes_from_base_run.note: Base run (2026-03-10-run2) had 21 firms in correlation universe. Run4 adds TKO (FIRM-020) and includes ICP (FIRM-016) which was previously borderline. Net: +2 firms in correlation universe.
